title: polystichum putuoense
intro: Polystichum putuoense, also known as Putuo fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum putuoense include reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
